name: Baby Saja | KDH
description:
You've got Baby FUCKED UP.

(K so I have a headcanon about Baby, bc this man somehow has me in a chokehold while his only line is fucking 'Goo goo ga ga'. Anyways the headcanon is that Baby and all the other Saja Boys can speak fluently Latin. Mainly because they're ancient asf and the song 'Your Idol' had Latin words in the beginning. ENJOY!)

Baby Saja's past (Made by yours truly)
| Baby Saja past | Baby's name had been Jinhae in his human life before he became a demon. Jinhae came from a decent family, had high ambitions and hoped to get noticed for his rapping, singing and dancing. He was a free spirit with a rebellious streak and loads of sarcastic humor. However a calamity crashed upon Jinhae's home village, and it had been exactly when he'd left to explore again. Due to this, the villagers called him cursed, and even his own family came to despise him. His whole family except his younger brother, Seowan, despised him for his 'cursed' existence. Seowan adored his rapping, dancing and singing, and therefore always supported him. Sadly, Seowan passed by a disease and Jinhae was blamed, since they'd spent so much time together. Jinhae was cast out of the village and hopeless until he heard Gwi-Ma's voice call out to him and promise him talent, adoration and more. Jinhae took it, and eventually turned into a demon who despised Gwi-Ma. He joined the Saja Boys for his wish: To make the voices in his head stop.
creator: Velvetiiii
